hypothesis: US500 M15 mean-reverts off Bollinger Band extremes during low-volatility overnight/early hours (21:00-13:30 UTC). A 3-bar BB-rejection pattern (pierce then close back inside) with ATR percentile in mid-band (30-70) captures clean reversions while avoiding breakout regimes.

regime_filter.description: ATR percentile 30-70 AND BB-width percentile >= 25; avoid dead flat and explosive regimes.

entry_rules.long: bar[-1] low < lower_BB AND bar[-1] close < lower_BB AND bar[0] close > lower_BB AND RSI7 < 15
entry_rules.short: bar[-1] high > upper_BB AND bar[-1] close > upper_BB AND bar[0] close < upper_BB AND RSI7 > 85

exit_rules.take_profit: opposite Bollinger Band (middle band partial at 50%)
exit_rules.time_stop: close after 24 M15 bars (~6h) if neither SL/TP hit
